name: Pipedrive
one_liner: Sales-focused CRM for managing pipelines, deals, contacts, and activities.
access_notes: Developers request a free Developer Sandbox account via a form at developers.pipedrive.com (a full Pipedrive company account, 5 seats, no payment); alternatively any regular account (14-day trial) gets a personal API token immediately from settings.
api_notes: RESTful JSON API with ~60 endpoint groups (deals, persons, organizations, activities, leads, products, projects, pipelines, users, webhooks, etc.), OpenAPI 3 specs for both v1 and the newer v2 API, plus official Node.js and PHP client libraries.
mcp_notes: Pipedrive launched a native, vendor-maintained MCP server (announced June 30, 2026) using OAuth connections for ChatGPT, Claude, and other MCP clients; multiple community MCP servers also exist on GitHub/PyPI.

evidence.claim: Pipedrive API supports API token (x-api-token header) and OAuth 2.0 (recommended for public/marketplace apps) authentication.
Official REST API reference lists ~60 endpoint categories with OpenAPI 3 specs for v1 and v2.
Free Developer Sandbox account (5 seats, works like a regular company account) is available by filling a form on the developer portal.
Outbound webhooks (v2) push create/change/delete events for 16+ object types, creatable via UI or POST /v1/webhooks.
Pipedrive ships an official native MCP server connecting CRM data to AI assistants via OAuth.

open_questions: Whether the Developer Sandbox form is granted fully automatically or after a short human review is not explicit (docs mention accounts 'can be deleted if inactive'); if any delay exists, the 14-day product trial is a guaranteed instant fallback for an API token.
